---
title: "Mónica Gómez‑Vadillo"
subtitle: "PhD Student at MNCN-CSIC · Biogeography · Macroecology · Data Science"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: Images/curvas_nivel_edit.png
#title-block-banner: Images/curvas_nivel.jpeg
#title-block-banner: Images/hexagon_edit.jpg
title-block-style: default
---

## Welcome to my personal blog
